hero.subtitleDefault: Talent Stack streamlines applicant management, optimizes interviews, and speeds up onboarding. A complete platform for modern HR teams.

features.heading: Everything you need to hire

applications.title: Applicant Management
applications.description: Centralize all your applications, track their progress, and collaborate with your team in real time.

interviews.title: Interview Scheduling
interviews.description: Organize your interviews effortlessly with our built-in calendar system and automatic notifications.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Tracking
onboarding.description: Support your new hires with a structured, personalized onboarding process.

analytics.title: Analytics & Reporting
analytics.description: Analyze your recruitment performance with detailed dashboards and key metrics.

automation.title: Smart Automation
automation.description: Automate repetitive tasks and focus on what truly matters: your candidates.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.description: Protect sensitive data with our secure, regulation-compliant infrastructure.

testimonials.heading: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: See how Talent Stack transforms the daily work of HR teams at companies of all sizes.

defaultItems.name: Marie Dubois
defaultItems.content: Talent Stack has revolutionized our recruitment process. We cut our time-to-hire by 60% and significantly improved the candidate experience.

defaultItems.name: Pierre Martin
defaultItems.content: The intuitive interface and automation features save us precious time. Our HR team is now more efficient than ever.

defaultItems.name: Sophie Laurent
defaultItems.content: As a fast-growing startup, we needed a scalable tool. Talent Stack fits our needs perfectly and grows right along with us.

defaultItems.name: Thomas Bernard
defaultItems.content: The onboarding tracking feature is outstanding. Our new hires are now much better supported from day one.

defaultItems.name: Amélie Rousseau
defaultItems.content: I recommend Talent Stack to all my clients. It's the most complete and easiest-to-use tool I've seen in the HR space.

defaultItems.name: Nicolas Petit
defaultItems.content: The analytics and reporting give us full visibility into our recruitment performance. The insights are invaluable for optimizing our processes.
